narrative:
Union Township A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,738 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.9 percentage points.
